executives.name: Alan Hair
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Hudbay Minerals Inc. Over 35 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Andrew Swarthout
executives.background: Former CEO and Executive Chairman of Bear Creek Mining Corporation.

executives.name: Catherine McLeod-Seltzer
executives.background: Ms. McLeod-Seltzer is an independent director and has been the Chair of the Board since 2019. She is a recognized leader in the minerals industry and has helped raise over $600 million in working capital for mining exploration.

executives.name: Ken Robertson
executives.background: Former partner at EY with over 35 years of experience in public accounting and the mining sector.
